title: Agents
subtitle: Customize your predefined agent presets with a dedicated workspace for metadata, prompts, tools, and feature toggles.

list.title: Agent presets
list.subtitle: Browse and open a preset to inspect or customize its behavior.
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by preset name or description
list.caption: Preset library
list.emptyDescription: Create your first preset to start customizing a dedicated agent.

overview.subtitle: Edit the preset identity here, then refine the full execution config in the panel on the right.
overview.emptyDescription: Choose a preset from the directory to review its metadata and configuration summary.
overview.metadataDescription: These fields describe and organize the preset without changing the underlying workflow structure.

fields.name: Preset name
fields.namePlaceholder: Give this preset a clear, scannable name
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the role, audience, or operating constraints for this preset

summary.promptsDescription: Prompt lengths help you spot overrides quickly without reading the full text.

config.title: Preset configuration
config.subtitle: Adjust prompts, graph type, feature toggles, and tool availability.

createDialog.title: Create agent preset
createDialog.description: Name the new preset. It will start from the default predefined configuration so you can customize it immediately.

delete.title: Delete agent preset
delete.description: Delete "{{name}}"? This removes the preset and its saved configuration.
delete.lastPresetHint: At least one preset must remain available.

reset.title: Reset preset configuration
reset.description: This resets prompts, graph selection, features, and tools back to the default configuration for this preset.

confirm.discardSelection: You have unsaved changes. Discard them and switch presets?
confirm.leavePage: You have unsaved changes on this agent preset. Leave this page and discard them?

skills.label: Skills
skills.defaultHint: Published defaults are read-only, sourced from public skill repositories, filtered to avoid Python-backed skills, and loaded lazily from their upstream SKILL.md files.
skills.searchPlaceholder: Search skills by name, description, or source
skills.emptyDefault: No default skills matched your search.
skills.emptyFilteredCustom: No custom skills matched your search.

editor.nameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Used as file name.

import.title: Import from GitHub
import.urlHint: Paste a GitHub file URL or raw.githubusercontent.com URL pointing to a .md skill file.

editor.bridgeHint: Browser MCP access supports HTTP or SSE. For local stdio MCP servers, copy a predefined supergateway command, run it in a terminal, then add the exposed local URL here.
editor.addDescription: Add an HTTP or SSE MCP endpoint exposed by a remote server or local supergateway bridge.

instructions.label: Instructions
instructions.placeholder: Describe your agent's role and behavior…
